creator: delphij@FreeBSD.org
text:
As of r304321, boot loader gained support of SHA512 and Skein; setting checksum=skein should be allowed for boot filesystems.

Same as https://www.illumos.org/issues/8906 .  Illumos change https://github.com/illumos/illumos-gate/commit/0dd498c0020c4a0dd34d350b07f97399a475d102 should be applied on FreeBSD too.
